title: Arachnophobia Mode
description: Spiders are replaced by red text saying "SPIDER"
body:
# This resource pack requires either OptiFine or ETF & EMF
- [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
![Steve looks worriedly at a red text saying "SPIDER"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24fdb32582b4bb2d6fa219a6126f5a4e48d5375c.png)

This resource pack makes all spiders red glowing text saying "SPIDER", an idea taken from Lethal Company's Arachnophobia Mode.

It works with regular and cave spiders alike, and in the case of cave spiders, it conveniently says "CAVE" on top of them.

["SPIDER" type text made using Blockbench's Minecraft Title Generator]
